title: AI Call Intelligence Platform
subtitle: AI-Powered Analytics for Enterprise Call Data
overview: AI-powered analytics engine processing 20M+ call records with LLM-to-SQL pipelines, vector search, and natural language querying.
architectureHighlights: LLM-to-SQL pipeline converting natural language to PostgreSQL
pgvector semantic search over millions of transcript embeddings
Dual-LLM architecture (GPT-4o Mini for SQL, GPT-4.1 Mini for synthesis)
Prompt injection prevention and query sandboxing

caseStudy.problem: Enterprise organizations generate millions of call records and transcripts but lack ability to extract actionable insights without dedicated data analysts writing SQL queries.
caseStudy.solution: Architected an AI analytics backend processing 20M+ call records, enabling natural language querying through an LLM-to-SQL pipeline and semantic search over transcript embeddings.
myRole: Architected the full AI analytics backend (NestJS)
Designed and built the LLM-to-SQL pipeline (GPT-4o Mini)
Integrated GPT-4.1 Mini for response synthesis
Engineered Redis caching strategy for sub-10s response times
caseStudy.architecture:
graph TD
    A[User Natural Language Query] --> B[NestJS API Layer]
    B --> C[LLM-to-SQL Engine - GPT-4o Mini]
    C --> D[Query Validation & Sanitization]
    D --> E[PostgreSQL - 20M+ Records]
    E --> F[Raw Query Results]
    F --> G[Response Synthesis - GPT-4.1 Mini]
    G --> H[Structured Analytical Summary]
    A --> I{Query Type Router}
    I --> |Semantic Search| J[Embedding Generation]
    J --> K[pgvector Similarity Search]
    K --> G
    B --> L[Redis Cache Layer]
    L --> |Cache Hit| H

technicalDecisions.reasoning: Keeps everything in PostgreSQL — no extra infra
Repeated analytical queries served from cache
Prevents prompt injection; ensures authorized data access

challenges: LLM-to-SQL accuracy — Schema-aware prompt engineering, query validation, and fallback handling.
Scale at 20M+ records — Composite indexing, query planning, and pagination.
Semantic search over transcripts — Generating/storing embeddings for millions of transcripts.
Prompt injection prevention — Input sanitization, query whitelisting, output validation.
Response time at scale — Sub-10s p95 via Redis caching and query optimization.
